CREATE TABLE test_casting (id INT, blob_data BLOB, varchar_data VARCHAR(16));
INSERT INTO test_casting (id, blob_data, varchar_data) VALUES (1, CONVERT('Sample Blob Data' AS BLOB), 'String Data');
SELECT CAST(blob_data AS VARCHAR) FROM test_casting WHERE id = 1;
SELECT CAST(varchar_data AS INTEGER) FROM test_casting WHERE id = 1;
SELECT CAST('2023-10-01' AS DATETIME) AS converted_datetime;
SELECT CAST(CAST(blob_data AS VARCHAR) AS VARBINARY) FROM test_casting WHERE id = 1;
SELECT CAST(CAST('123.456' AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR) AS truncated_value FROM test_casting;
SELECT id, CAST(varchar_data AS VARCHAR(32)) AS extended_varchar FROM test_casting;
SELECT id, CAST(blob_data AS VARBINARY) AS varbinary_data FROM test_casting;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_casting;
CREATE TABLE blob_test (data BLOB);
INSERT INTO blob_test (data) VALUES (CONVERT('Another Blob Data Example' AS BLOB));
SELECT CAST(data AS VARCHAR) FROM blob_test;
SELECT CAST(CAST('text' AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR) FROM test_casting;
SELECT id, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS null_casted_value FROM test_casting;
CREATE TABLE multi_cast_test (a INT, b BLOB, c VARCHAR(50), d DATETIME);
INSERT INTO multi_cast_test (a, b, c, d) VALUES (2, CONVERT('Some Data' AS BLOB), 'Hello World', '2023-10-01 10:00:00');
SELECT a, CAST(b AS VARCHAR) AS blob_as_varchar, CAST(d AS VARBINARY) AS datetime_as_varbinary FROM multi_cast_test;
SELECT a, CAST(CAST(c AS VARCHAR(100)) AS INTEGER) AS varchar_to_integer FROM multi_cast_test;
SELECT id, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(10)) AS null_string FROM test_casting;
SELECT CAST(varchar_data AS VARCHAR(16)) FROM test_casting WHERE id = 1;
